title: Server-Side Waypoints
description: Server-side mod that adds waypoints without any client-side companion.
body:
# Server-Side Waypoints (sswaypoints)

Server-side mod that adds waypoints without any client-side companion.

![Picture of a waypoint](https://github.com/sylvxa/sswaypoints/blob/main/src/main/resources/assets/sswaypoints/icon.png?raw=true)

*NOTE: I kind of wrote this project as a proof-of-concept, so it'll be rough around the edges for a little while.*

**This mod requires [Rosemary](https://modrinth.com/mod/rosemarylib) to function.**

## Usage

Waypoints are added using the Quick Actions menu (opened with the `G` keybind by default)

You can:
- Add a waypoint (coordinates default to wherever you are currently standing)
- Edit an existing waypoint
- Remove a waypoint
- Teleport to a waypoint (assuming you have permission)
- Toggle some display settings regarding how the waypoints show up in-game
